basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL) Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website of ICSIL. A total of 1 Data Entry Operator vacancy has been announced through the ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

all_official_links.label: Download ICSIL Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Overview
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICSIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICSIL Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICSIL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Data Entry Operator. This is a contractual position offered by Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Data Entry Operator post in this recruitment drive by ICSIL.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application process for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this job is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. However, the Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 17-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Data Entry Operator post is a Graduate degree in any stream.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 24356 Per Month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The age limit details are not specified in the provided information. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICSIL office in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110044.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview.
